tasks.label: proof-forge: check EVM
tasks.command: lake env proof-forge check --target evm --root . Counter.lean

tasks.label: proof-forge: check Solana
tasks.command: lake env proof-forge check --target solana-sbpf-asm --root . Counter.lean

tasks.label: proof-forge: check NEAR
tasks.command: lake env proof-forge check --target wasm-near --root . Counter.lean
